outcome_record.event_name: Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru — IPL 2026

prediction.pre_match_note: Wankhede evening T20. High dew forecast (humidity 82%). MI batting first. Dew risk flag active — RCB will benefit from chasing in dew conditions. Applied dew_factor modifier 0.95 to MI (batting first disadvantage). MI home advantage and Rohit Sharma form positive signal.

calibration_flags.notes: Dew was present as forecast but MI defended successfully. Dew modifier direction correct (reduced MI advantage) but MI won despite dew. Confirms: dew modifier reduces batting-first advantage but does not override team quality differential. Wankhede dew pattern validated.
